description: An adjustment document that corrects a payable without re-issuing the invoice. A credit note (supplier-issued) reduces the payable; a debit note (buyer-raised) increases or recovers it. Raised to resolve a return acceptance or a match exception (price/quantity/tax variance) and posted against the per-supplier creditor ledger. Build-new control: neither source company modeled it, but a return or exception must adjust the payable via a note, not a re-keyed invoice.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Note Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the adjustment to the invoice/return/exception it corrects and forward to the creditor-ledger posting so every payable adjustment is traceable.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Note Type
fields.validation: credit (supplier-issued, reduces payable) or debit (buyer-raised, recovers/increases payable)
fields.purpose: Sets the direction of the adjustment: credit reduces what is owed to the supplier (return accepted, overcharge), debit recovers value from the supplier (shortfall, buyer-raised charge). Drives the sign of the creditor-ledger posting.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier must exist; inherited from the linked invoice/return
fields.purpose: Names the party whose payable is adjusted so the posting lands on the correct creditor ledger and the supplier's aging reflects the note.

fields.name: linkedInvoiceId
fields.label: Linked Invoice
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the note adjusts a specific invoice's payable
fields.validation: invoice exists; at least one of linkedInvoiceId / linkedReturnId / linkedMatchExceptionId must be present
fields.purpose: Ties the adjustment to the invoice it corrects so the net payable on that invoice (and the GR/IR clearing) reflects the note rather than a re-issued document.

fields.name: linkedReturnId
fields.label: Linked Return
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the note arises from a return/RMA acceptance (diagram 11)
fields.validation: return exists and is accepted/closed; at least one of the three links must be present
fields.purpose: Links the note to the return acceptance that justifies it so a returned/defective quantity adjusts the payable through the note and the budget relief is reversed for the returned quantity.

fields.name: linkedMatchExceptionId
fields.label: Linked Match Exception
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the note resolves a match exception (price-variance / qty-over / qty-under / tax-mismatch)
fields.validation: exception exists; resolution is credit-note or debit-note; at least one of the three links must be present
fields.purpose: Links the note to the match exception it resolves so a price or quantity variance is closed by adjusting the payable (resolution credit-note/debit-note) and the match moves to matched.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; inherited from the linked invoice/return
fields.purpose: The note currency; the base-currency sibling is FX-converted so the ledger posting and aging are normalized (axiom A12).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Note Amount
fields.purpose: The principal adjustment value that moves the payable up (debit) or down (credit); posted to the creditor ledger and netted into the affected invoice's settlement.

fields.name: taxAmount
fields.label: Tax Amount
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the adjustment carries tax (so the match reconciles amounts including tax)
fields.validation: >= 0; the tax component of the adjustment
fields.purpose: The tax portion of the adjustment, carried separately so the three-way/two-way match reconciles invoice amounts including tax (axiom A8) and input-credit on the adjusted tax is corrected.

fields.name: reason
fields.label: Reason
fields.validation: non-empty; the business justification for the adjustment
fields.purpose: The mandatory justification an auditor reads to understand why the payable was adjusted (return accepted, price overcharge, short delivery, tax error). Never a silent change to the payable.

fields.name: postedToLedger
fields.label: Posted to Ledger
fields.validation: true once the note is posted to the supplier creditor ledger as a transaction-history entry
fields.purpose: Marks that the note has been posted against the per-supplier creditor ledger so the payable balance and aging reflect it; prevents a double-post of the same adjustment.

fields.name: createdById
fields.label: Raised By
fields.validation: the user who raised the note
fields.purpose: Records who raised the adjustment for the audit trail and accountability of payable changes.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.label: Created At
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the adjustment was raised; the date the ledger posting carries and the basis for aging the adjustment.

invariants: A8 match reconciles amounts including tax; exception resolution may be credit-note/debit-note
A12 base-currency normalization for ledger posting and aging
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
at least one of linkedInvoiceId/linkedReturnId/linkedMatchExceptionId must be set
